4644339.title: List of United States representatives from New York
4644339.extract: The following is a list of United States representatives from the state of New York. For chronological tables of members of both houses of the United States Congress from the state (through the present day), see New York's congressional delegations. The list of names should be complete as of January 3, 2025, but other data may be incomplete.
